---
title: "Course notes — Geostatistics and Mining Geology"
---

::: {.card .hover-lift}
::: {.card-header}
### Course notes
:::
::: {.card-body}
**Author:** Dany Lauzon · **Language:** French

Open-access course notes for geostatistics and mining geology.

[{{< fa book-open >}} Open the course notes](https://danlauz.github.io/glq3401-3651/){.btn .btn-primary}
:::
:::

*Content to be completed (table of contents, format, license) as you see fit.*
